frontmatter.title: A generalized modality for recursion
frontmatter.meta: @inproceedings{guatto-2018, author = {Guatto, Adrien}, booktitle = {Proceedings of the 33rd Annual {ACM/IEEE} Symposium on Logic in Computer Science, {LICS} 2018, Oxford, UK, July 09-12, 2018}, year = {2018}, doi = {10.1145/3209108.3209148}, pages = {482--491}, title = {A Generalized Modality for Recursion}, }

meta.name: venue

link.title: LICS ’18: 33rd Annual ACM/IEEE Symposium on Logic in Computer Science

meta.link: LICS ’18: 33rd Annual ACM/IEEE Symposium on Logic in Computer Science

frontmatter.title: LICS ’18: 33rd Annual ACM/IEEE Symposium on Logic in Computer Science

mainmatter.p: The LICS Symposium is an annual international forum on theoretical and practical topics in computer science that relate to logic, broadly construed.
